prose: **Phenol Fukui reactivity descriptors** computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, PySCF backend) in gas phase, neutral ground state (charge 0, multiplicity 1). Input geometry: user-supplied phenol.xyz; single-point calculation (no reoptimization). Mulliken partial charges computed for neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (−1, doublet) states; Fukui condensed indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor derived. SCF converged for all three states. Charge conservation passed: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000. **Key findings:** Most electrophilic site = C atom 3 (f⁺ = 2.1028); most nucleophilic site = O atom 1 (f⁻ = 0.1620). Atom count: 13. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. Integrity status: trustworthy (ok).</prose>
